---
title: "edfinr Refresher"
---

## Overview

A quick refresher on the edfinr package for returning EdFund fellows. We'll recap the key functions and data structures before diving into new analysis.

## Slides

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides.html" width="100%" height="475px"></iframe>
```

[View slides in full screen](slides.html){target="_blank"}
